name: RE:COVER
subtitle: BPC 157
description: BPC 157 — Joint recovery and gut protection compound studied for tissue regeneration and resilience.
details: Body Protection Compound 157 is a 15-amino acid peptide derived from human gastric juice. Extensively studied for its role in tissue protection, gut lining repair, and systemic recovery in research models.

name: RE:PAIR
subtitle: TB 500
description: TB 500 — Thymosin Beta-4 for muscle, tendon, and ligament repair research.
details: Synthetic version of a naturally occurring 43-amino acid peptide that plays a crucial role in actin regulation, cell migration, and tissue regeneration. Studied extensively in recovery and healing research.
benefits: Faster Recovery from Injury or Strain
New Blood Vessel and Tissue Growth

name: RE:BUILD
subtitle: TB 500 + BPC 157
description: TB 500 + BPC 157 combo — the ultimate recovery stack for advanced tissue repair research.
details: A powerful research combination of TB-500 (Thymosin Beta-4) and BPC-157. Together these compounds are studied for synergistic effects on muscle, tendon, ligament repair, and systemic tissue regeneration.
benefits: Faster Recovery from Injury and Strain

name: RE:ZEMPIC
subtitle: Semaglutide
description: Semaglutide — GLP-1 receptor agonist for metabolic and appetite regulation research.
details: Synthetic analogue of the human glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1). Used extensively in metabolic, appetite regulation, and insulin sensitivity studies.

name: RE:ZEPATIDE
subtitle: Tirzepatide
description: Tirzepatide — Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist for advanced metabolic research.
details: Novel synthetic peptide that activates both GIP and GLP-1 receptors simultaneously. A cutting-edge tool for metabolic, diabetes, and obesity research.

name: RE:TATRUTIDE
subtitle: Retatrutide
description: Retatrutide — Triple receptor agonist (GIP/GLP-1/Glucagon) for advanced metabolic research.
details: Next-generation synthetic peptide activating GIP, GLP-1, and glucagon receptors. Among the most potent research tools for studying metabolic regulation, appetite control, and energy expenditure.

name: RE:SHAPE
subtitle: Tesamorelin
description: Tesamorelin — GHRH analogue for body composition and growth hormone research.
details: Synthetic analogue of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH). Studied for its effects on growth hormone secretion, body composition, and metabolic health in research settings.
benefits: Reduction of Visceral and Abdominal Fat

name: RE:TALIATE
subtitle: MOTS-c
description: MOTS-c — Mitochondrial-derived peptide for cellular energy and performance research.
details: 16-amino acid peptide encoded within the mitochondrial genome. Regulates metabolic homeostasis, cellular energy sensing, and mitochondrial function in research models.

name: RE:GLOW
subtitle: GHK-Cu
description: GHK-Cu — Copper peptide for skin regeneration, wound healing, and longevity research.
details: Glycyl-L-histidyl-L-lysine copper complex. A naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex studied extensively for its role in collagen synthesis, wound healing, and cellular regeneration.
